name: cheapsteak-agent-plugins
description: Chang's Claude Code plugins — generic dev workflow, skill authoring, and macOS/web utilities

plugins.name: git-flow
plugins.description: Commit, push, PR, rebase, and review-feedback workflows on top of git + gh CLI

plugins.name: skill-authoring-kit
plugins.description: Build Claude skills, plugins, and hooks. Bundles skill-authoring guide, plugin scaffolder, and hook-output reference.

plugins.name: agent-workflow
plugins.description: Process patterns for working with Claude: stress-test artifacts via Adversary/Counterweight, and schedule delayed prompts that fire later in the current session.

plugins.name: monitor
plugins.description: Background polling loop that monitors an external system and wakes Claude only when state changes. Spends zero tokens while waiting.

plugins.name: macos-ops
plugins.description: macOS sysadmin skills. Today: diagnose memory pressure and identify what's consuming RAM.

plugins.name: web-tools
plugins.description: Browse the web with a real browser to verify UI behavior, diagnose frontend issues, or take screenshots. Today: Playwright-CLI-based browsing.

plugins.name: gql
plugins.description: GraphQL and Apollo Client patterns. Today: Apollo cache updates for mutations.
